sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61478" key="la/brus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λάβρυς</orth>, <sense id="n61478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πέλεκυς</ref></xr>, Lydian word, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.302a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
